payload.answer: In admin SQL select-only mode, a read-only query such as `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10` is allowed, while a mutating query such as `DELETE FROM memory_cards` is denied. No durable memory should be created from this debug fixture.
citations: Admin SQL select-only mode - SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied

entity_resolution.reason: Input describes an admin SQL permission/behavior fixture, not a user preference or durable personal fact.

details: Recognized this as a debug/admin SQL behavior check.
Preserved the distinction between allowed SELECT and denied DELETE.
Did not create memory cards because the input is not durable user memory.
